data.title: Square enables Bitcoin payments for millions of sellers, shifting acceptance from opt-in to opt-out for eligible ones.
data.description: Square, a payment processor owned by Block, has made a change in its Bitcoin acceptance policy for eligible sellers. The shift is from opt-in to opt-out, meaning sellers will now need to actively choose not to accept Bitcoin as a form of payment. This change aims to increase the adoption of Bitcoin within the Square platform and make it more accessible to users. Notably, this adjustment will impact a significant number of sellers who use Square for processing payments.

data.title: NASPA Accepting Applications for the Holistic Career Advising Cohort
data.description: Applications are being received by the Student Affairs Administrators in Higher Education (NASPA) for the 2026-2027 Advising Success Network cohort focused on 'On-Ramps to Holistic Career Advising for Student Success.' Individuals interested in applying must submit their applications by April 23, 2026.

data.title: USA Rare Earth Shares Dip After Disappointing Q4 EPS
data.description: Shares of USA Rare Earth Inc (NASDAQ: USAR) are experiencing a decline in trading as the company’s fourth-quarter results fell well below analysts’ expectations. The company reported an adjusted EPS of (0.19) for the quarter, a significant miss compared to the anticipated (0.06) consensus, representing a 201.59% downside surprise. This steep decline in earnings drove immediate selling pressure from short-term traders and quant-driven strategies. Additionally, the loss widened from the previous year's figure of $(0.15) per share, indicating a concerning year-over-year deterioration in profitability despite the company's expansion efforts. For more details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: With Jackie Lombard and AEG Presents, JCDecaux showcases in France and around the world Céline Dion’s return to the stage
data.description: JCDecaux, in collaboration with Jackie Lombard and AEG Presents, is promoting Céline Dion's comeback on stage in France and globally. This initiative aims to reach a wide audience and capitalize on the star power of Céline Dion. The campaign will be visible in various locations, ensuring broad visibility with an estimated audience reach of millions worldwide. The collaboration highlights the anticipation and excitement surrounding Céline Dion's return to performing live, attracting significant attention from fans and the general public alike.

data.title: PrideStaff Expands North Texas Footprint with New Dallas (Southwest) Office
data.description: In Dallas on March 30, 2026, PrideStaff, a franchised staffing organization, shared news about launching a new staffing and employment agency in Dallas (Southwest). Jake Yoon, the Owner/Strategic-Partner, will lead the new office, catering to clients and job seekers in the region.

data.title: In HelloNation, Expert Contractor Cory Getz Details When to Schedule a Roof Inspection After Hail Damage
data.description: In a recent article published on March 30, 2026, from Greenwood, Indiana, it emphasizes the importance of timely roof inspections in identifying damage, safeguarding insurance coverage, and avoiding future roof problems. The article discusses the recommended timing for homeowners to schedule roof inspections following hail damage. HelloNation provides detailed insight into this issue to inform homeowners on the crucial steps to take to maintain their roofs properly.

data.title: Bernstein advises buying the dip in Coinbase, Robinhood, and Figure stocks as they are 60% off their peaks, despite weak Q1 earnings.
data.description: Bernstein believes that there is a chance to invest in cryptocurrency stocks as they are currently trading approximately 60% lower than their peak values in 2025. Despite this, the first-quarter earnings for these stocks appear to be underwhelming.

data.title: Metropolitan Systems Complete™: Your Partner for Flawless Flooring Projects
data.description: A new flooring solution named Metropolitan Systems Complete™ is being launched by Metropolitan Floors in Vancouver, British Columbia. Aimed at aiding builders, installers, and architects in achieving seamless flooring projects, this integrated system includes products for subfloor preparation, installation adhesives, and flooring maintenance. Designed to work cohesively with Kentwood and Evoke flooring throughout North America, the system eradicates uncertainties by offering products that complement each other. This initiative by Metropolitan Floors signifies a strategic move to cater to the needs of professionals in the industry and enhance the quality of flooring projects across the region.

data.title: CA Dept of Insurance Finds Rebuilding Fire-Safe From LA Fires Would Reduce Losses by One-Third; Survivors Back Bill Requiring Insurers to Cover Fire-Safe Homes, Says Consumer Watchdog
data.description: In the recent analysis conducted on March 30, 2026, it was revealed that insurance average annual losses could decrease significantly by 33% in the fire-prone regions of Eaton and Pacific Palisades if homeowners opt to reconstruct their properties with fire-safe materials. This data has further strengthened the argument in favor of a proposed legislation that would mandate insurance companies to provide this option to policyholders. This initiative aims to mitigate the impact of fires in these areas and encourage homeowners to take preventive measures.

data.title: BioLab Holdings Earns Great Place to Work® Certification
data.description: BioLab Holdings, based in Phoenix, revealed on March 30, 2026, that it has achieved certification as a Great Place to Work®. This prestigious designation is granted solely based on employee input and workplace evaluations. It reflects the company's strong dedication to its employees, mission, and operational excellence. This recognition underscores BioLab Holdings' commitment to fostering a positive work environment.

data.title: PrideStaff Welcomes New Strategic-Partners to Ontario and South Riverside County Offices
data.description: On March 30, 2026, in Fresno, California, PrideStaff, a widely franchised staffing agency, revealed changes in ownership for its Ontario and South Riverside County branches. Mariela Cabrera and Leonardo Baloa are the new Owners/Strategic-Partners of these offices, as of the mentioned date. This transition marks a significant shift in leadership for the branches, bringing fresh perspectives to these locations.

data.title: Asure Appoints Tiffany Mortimer as Chief Transformation & People Officer
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Asure Software, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASUR) based in Austin, Texas, announced the appointment of Tiffany Mortimer as their Chief Transformation & People Officer. With 15 years of experience in leading enterprise transformation, operational execution, and people strategy at high-growth SaaS companies, Mortimer joins Asure at a crucial time as the company is preparing for its future growth phase. As a leading provider of cloud-based Human Capital Management software solutions, Asure is focused on strengthening its operational and organizational structure under Mortimer's leadership.

data.title: Osprey Landscape Group Expands Texas Platform with Acquisition of Palm Gardens Landscape in the Dallas-Fort Worth Market
data.description: In Dallas on March 30, 2026, Osprey Landscape Group, a prominent commercial landscape services provider owned by Southfield Capital, disclosed their acquisition of Palm Gardens, a well-known company offering similar services. This strategic move bolsters Osprey's market position and strengthens their portfolio in the industry. The acquisition signifies a significant development for both companies and highlights the continued growth and expansion of Osprey Landscape Group.
